acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Renderer path builds and tests on macOS
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: xcodebuild.log records the focused passing Metal render tests; macos-check.log records the final full macOS gate.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: A visible frame or test pattern is presented
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: MetalTestPatternView is an MTKView-backed renderer and MadobeMacApp wires it into ContentView. The hardware render report remains offscreen render-target evidence, not display/drawable presentation evidence.

render-report.json includes commandBufferStatus completed, sampledPixelBGRA8 [0,0,255,255], and renderDurationNanoseconds. The legacy presentedTestPattern field is annotated as offscreen test-pattern validation, not display presentation.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Screenshot evidence is saved when practical
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: notes.md documents why GUI screenshot capture was not practical for this noninteractive run and records the practical visual/render evidence used instead.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No streaming latency claim is made until cross-device validation
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: notes.md states this node makes no live streaming, cross-device validation, or latency claim.
